privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task requires interacting with the live public site check.torproject.org to capture Tor exit node details. The target output directory and file paths (/home/ga/Documents/OpsecLogs/check_source.html and /home/ga/Documents/OpsecLogs/exit_ip.txt) are explicitly stated in the task description and checked by the export and verifier scripts.
